description: Ana Isabel Betz is currently admitted as an inpatient for observation. As the attending nurse, create a Patient Rounding record for her in GNU Health. Document the following vital signs and clinical observations: Temperature: 37.8 °C, Systolic BP: 148 mmHg, Diastolic BP: 92 mmHg, Heart Rate: 104 bpm, Respiratory Rate: 20 breaths/min, Oxygen Saturation (SpO2): 96 %, Blood glucose (Glycemia): 285 mg/dL, Glasgow Coma Scale: Eyes=4 (Spontaneous), Verbal=5 (Oriented), Motor=6 (Obeys commands), and Pain level: 3. Ensure the record is saved to her active inpatient registration. Login credentials
